tools.name: list-code-scanning-alerts
tools.description: List GitHub Advanced Security code scanning alerts for a repository or organisation. Returns alert number, state, severity, rule ID/name, tool name, file location, and a link. Use owner + repo for repository scope; omit repo for org-level. Requires the token to have the 'security_events' scope (classic PAT) or 'Code scanning alerts: Read' (fine-grained PAT).

params.name: owner
params.description: GitHub organisation or user name (e.g. 'octocat' or 'my-org')

params.name: repo
params.description: Repository name without owner (e.g. 'Hello-World'). Omit to query org-level alerts.

params.name: state
params.description: Filter by alert state. Defaults to all states.

params.name: ref
params.description: Filter to alerts on a specific Git ref (e.g. 'refs/heads/main').

params.name: max_results
params.description: Maximum number of alerts to return. If the result set is truncated, the response includes truncated=true, total_fetched, and a truncation_reason. Omit to return all results up to the server limit of 2000.

tools.name: get-code-scanning-alert
tools.description: Get full details of a single GitHub code scanning alert, including rule description, CWE tags, tool version, exact file location, and dismissal information.

params.name: alert_number
params.description: The alert number (from list-code-scanning-alerts or the GitHub URL).

tools.name: list-dependabot-alerts
tools.description: List Dependabot vulnerability alerts for a repository or organisation. Returns alert number, state, severity, package ecosystem and name, GHSA/CVE IDs, CVSS score, EPSS percentage, and the first patched version. Use owner + repo for repository scope; omit repo for org-level. Requires the 'Dependabot alerts: Read' scope.

params.name: repo
params.description: Repository name without owner. Omit to query org-level alerts.

params.name: max_results
params.description: Maximum number of alerts to return. If the result set is truncated, the response includes truncated=true, total_fetched, and a truncation_reason. Omit to return all results up to the server limit of 2000.

tools.name: get-dependabot-alert
tools.description: Get full details of a single Dependabot alert, including advisory description, CVSS vector, EPSS score, CWE identifiers, vulnerable version range, and first patched version.

params.name: alert_number
params.description: The alert number (from list-dependabot-alerts or the GitHub URL).

tools.name: list-secret-scanning-alerts
tools.description: List GitHub secret scanning alerts for a repository or organisation. Returns alert number, state, secret type, validity, whether the secret was publicly leaked, and whether push protection was bypassed. The actual secret value is never returned. Use owner + repo for repository scope; omit repo for org-level. Requires the 'Secret scanning alerts: Read' scope.

params.name: repo
params.description: Repository name without owner. Omit to query org-level alerts.

params.name: max_results
params.description: Maximum number of alerts to return. If the result set is truncated, the response includes truncated=true, total_fetched, and a truncation_reason. Omit to return all results up to the server limit of 2000.
